review_notes: The functions provided are relevant to the control AC-17(10) as they focus on securing remote access through authentication and authorization, which are critical for remote command execution security. The use of NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic is also pertinent to controlling remote access. However, the reasoning could be expanded to include the importance of ensuring that the API server is not only configured for authentication and RBAC but also that these configurations are enforced and monitored.
title: Remote Access - Remote access | authenticate remote commands implement [ assignment
step1_reasoning: The control AC-17(10) focuses on ensuring secure remote access and authentication of remote commands. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that the API server is securely configured to authenticate and authorize requests, which is handled by enabling authentication and RBAC authorization. Additionally, NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict network access to the cluster, ensuring that only authorized ingress and egress traffic is allowed.
